notes: FMVs don't play, but it's easy to skip them. Text doesn't show properly, all the characters are replaced with closing square brackets. There are very long loading times and the game is overall sluggish and not very responsive - loading a save takes a solid minute, and the game can take seconds processing actions in battles and menus that would normally be instant. VN sections seem to run fine other than the glitched text.
title: War of the Human Tanks

notes: Seems to be working well, but videos don't seem to play.
title: War of the Human Tanks

notes: Extreme performance issues. Every action is delayed. Even mouse clicking in menus takes half a second to register. Loading game, eventually moving in menus or doing anything meaningful takes much much longer. Battles seem to work with similar delay that menus have and are very slow. Loading a battle took ridiculous amount of time (maybe 5 to 10 minutes).
title: War of the Human Tanks

notes: It seems most of the performance issues was due to game being ran from ntfs-partition. Loading times have dropped in less than one tenth part compared to ntfs. Navigating menus work, but doing anything that involves units takes still closer to a second. Battles work and could be played in theory, but are very jerky and tedious because of the delay. Also movies don't play (missed that from my earlier report).
title: War of the Human Tanks
